title: ophrys lutea subsp. minor
intro: Ophrys lutea subsp. minor, also known as the yellow bee orchid, is a rare and endangered subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The yellow bee orchid is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Ophrys lutea subsp. minor is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
